Run with purpose.
Train with clarity.

Guidance that simplifies the process and strengthens your stride

Get Started

Meet Jake Peal

Jake Peal has raced everything from local 5Ks to the Boston Marathon, and he brings that experience straight into his coaching. He’s spent years training high school and junior‑high runners, teaching them how to run smarter, stay consistent, and enjoy the sport. Peal Paced Track Club is his way of sharing that passion with every athlete.

Personalized Training Path

A plan built around your life, not someone else’s pace. We map out clear weekly steps, adjust for real-world demands, and build a rhythm you can actually sustain. Consistency becomes automatic when the plan fits who you are.

Purposeful Workouts

Every run has a job. Easy days build your engine, workouts sharpen your speed, and recovery keeps you progressing. You will always know why you are doing something and how it moves you forward.

Measurable, Momentum-Building Progress

We track the right metrics, celebrate the right wins, and refine the plan as you grow. Small improvements stack into breakthroughs when you follow a system designed for long-term success.

Training Packages

Whether you are just starting out or looking to break through to the next level, we have a training package designed to meet you where you are and help you reach your goals.

01

Base Training

Build your aerobic engine

8–12 weeks

Build aerobic strength, consistency, and foundational mileage with structured easy runs and light workouts.

Easy‑run consistency, Aerobic development, Light workouts, Foundational mileage

02

Race Prep

Sharpen for your target race

6–10 weeks

Dial in pacing, workouts, and long‑run structure to peak for your target race with confidence.

Race‑pace workouts, Long‑run structure, Pacing strategy, Fueling practice

03

Performance Coaching

High‑touch, adaptive coaching

Ongoing

High‑touch coaching with detailed feedback, data review, and adaptive weekly adjustments.

Weekly adjustments, Data‑driven insights, Form & efficiency, Holistic performance

Ready to run?

Whether you’re just starting out or looking to break through to the next level, I’m here to help you run smarter, stay consistent, and enjoy the process. Let’s build a plan that fits your life and gets you where you want to go.
